name: the-prize
description: Daniel Yergin's The Prize — an executable toolkit exploring the epic history of oil: how oil shaped wars, economies, and geopolitics from the 19th century to the Gulf War
useCase: Helps anyone understand the central role of oil in modern history — from the rise of Standard Oil to OPEC, the oil shocks of the 1970s, and the Gulf War.
knownRisks: The book covers oil history through the early 1990s
